title: Extra Eeveelutions [Cobblemon]
description: A Datapack that adds evolutions for Eevee for the types that do not have them.
body: # Extra Eeveelutions for Cobblemon! # Remember to download the Resource Pack as well! It is separate!, Click on the version of Extra Eeveelutions you wish to download in the Versions tab, and below the Datapack Download should be the Resource Pack download as well! ## New Models done by Fiddy and Glaceon/Glacee! - Check out Cobble Souls! ## Evereon's new model done by Zynzeki! Extra Eeveelutions aims to add **11** new evolutions to **Eevee** in Cobblemon, for the types that do not have Eeveelutions as of the time of this packs creation. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ # All Information on the Eeveelutions can be found in my Discord, which is to the right of this page, it was moved so I could more easily edit them when needed. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ## ***If you'd like to know if it's okay to use this pack on a Public server, or need help with the datapack, DM me on Discord: @cykosu*** `(Won't accept if we do not share a mutual server, or if you do not send a message request.)` ## **If you'd like to support me, You can find my Ko-Fi to the right of the page!**
